commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests on RHEL 8.1
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests on RHEL 8.1

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,CONF_SANITY_EXCEPT="116" \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=conf-sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,CONF_SANITY_EXCEPT="116 117" \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=conf-sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=racer

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,SANITY_EXCEPT="136 413" \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el8.1 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full

Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
